mapper.sql: id, market_code, trade_date, is_trading_day, is_half_day, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_calendar (market_code, trade_date, is_trading_day, is_half_day, remark) VALUES (#{marketCode}, #{tradeDate}, #{isTradingDay}, #{isHalfDay}, #{remark})

INSERT INTO market_calendar (market_code, trade_date, is_trading_day, is_half_day, remark) VALUES
(#{item.marketCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.isTradingDay}, #{item.isHalfDay}, #{item.remark})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM market_calendar WHERE market_code = #{marketCode} AND trade_date <= #{tradeDate} AND is_trading_day = TRUE ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_calendar WHERE market_code = #{marketCode}
